title: Senior Solutions Architect
summary: Supported the systems and engineers behind a quantum-computing platform. Owned the reliability of the backend that research and development depended on, and studied the domain closely alongside the people building it.
bullets: Kept the IT and backend systems that quantum engineers relied on stable and secure.
Studied quantum computing hands-on, including Amazon Braket and Q#.
Learned to translate deeply technical work for the people and systems around it.
